activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
Mixed origins per article with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'West Food i Göteborg AB' from certificate explicitly matches the exporter name and address in the invoice, including exact company name and country Sweden after normalization (4.1.0, 4.1.4). Company name found exactly in invoice header and addresses on multiple pages.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' is explicitly identified in invoice consignee fields and matched exactly after normalization. Country Thailand matches exactly between certificate and invoice (4.2.1, 4.2.3).

goods_description.certificate_value: Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks
goods_description.invoice_value: Baking Glue 100g, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks (various detailed product lines)
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a generic goods description with explicit invoice references and dates. The invoice contains detailed product lines including 'Baking Glue' which matches the certificate and confirms the reference (4.3.5). Multiple origins (SE, PL, FI) in certificate confirmed via invoice details matching EU origin normalization (4.3.7).

quantity.invoice_value: 2 620,644 kg Gross Weight; 2 194,645 kg Net Weight; 1 177 cartons
quantity.motivation: Quantities in certificate (gross, net weight and carton count) match exactly numerically and by unit with invoice totals. Thousand separators normalized (points and spaces), quantities and units fully identified (4.4.1, 4.4.3.3).

origin.invoice_value: Origin confirmed as European Union member countries including SE, PL, FI
origin.motivation: Certificate origin lists European Community and member states SE, PL, FI. Invoice explicitly confirms origins from these EU member countries, with no conflicting non-EU origins. EU origin normalization per rules applied (4.5.4.1, 4.6).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match based on explicit text matches, allowed normalizations, and invoice reference verification. No mismatches or uncertainty detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan tydligt verifieras mot fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
